requirement_topic.en: Bangladesh Fire-Safety Review for BESS Sites
requirement_topic.zh: 孟加拉国BESS场址消防安全审查
requirement_topic.zht: 孟加拉國BESS場址消防安全審查

summary.en: BESS installations in Bangladesh should be screened for building, industrial, warehouse, factory, power-project, and local fire-authority requirements. Review may include site layout, separation, access, ventilation or gas management, fire detection and suppression, emergency shutdown, signage, fire-service access, hazardous-material information, and emergency response procedures.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国BESS安装应筛查建筑、工业、仓储、工厂、电力项目和地方消防主管机关要求。审查内容可能包括场址布置、间距、通道、通风或气体管理、火灾探测和灭火、紧急停机、标识、消防通道、危险材料信息和应急响应程序。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國BESS安裝應篩查建築、工業、倉儲、工廠、電力項目和地方消防主管機關要求。審查內容可能包括場址佈置、間距、通道、通風或氣體管理、火災探測和滅火、緊急停機、標識、消防通道、危險材料資訊和應急響應程序。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh Fire Prevention and Extinction Act, 2003
Fire Service and Civil Defence clearance or local fire-authority review where applicable

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These documents can support Bangladesh due diligence but do not replace Bangladesh local fire clearance, site approval, insurer review, or owner acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目消防审查管理固定式储能安全。这些文件可支持孟加拉国尽调，但不能替代孟加拉国地方消防许可、场址批准、保险方审查或业主验收。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目消防審查管理固定式儲能安全。這些文件可支持孟加拉國盡調，但不能替代孟加拉國地方消防許可、場址批准、保險方審查或業主驗收。

gap.en: Prepare installation drawings, fire-protection design, thermal-runaway mitigation evidence, ventilation or gas-detection rationale, emergency shutdown logic, monitoring records, SDS, and local-language emergency procedures for the Bangladesh project reviewer and fire authority.
gap.zh: 应准备安装图、消防设计、热失控缓解证据、通风或气体探测依据、紧急停机逻辑、监控记录、SDS和当地语言应急程序，供孟加拉国项目审查方和消防主管机关审查。
gap.zht: 應準備安裝圖、消防設計、熱失控緩解證據、通風或氣體探測依據、緊急停機邏輯、監控記錄、SDS和當地語言應急程序，供孟加拉國項目審查方和消防主管機關審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where fire-code, factory, building, warehouse, power-project, local fire-authority, insurer, owner, or permit review applies; project-specific for small standalone equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

source.publisher: Legislative and Parliamentary Affairs Division, Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Battery test reports do not close the Bangladesh site fire-safety gap. Treat fire review as a site and project approval issue.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电池测试报告不能覆盖孟加拉国场址消防安全差距。应将消防审查作为场址和项目批准事项处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電池測試報告不能覆蓋孟加拉國場址消防安全差距。應將消防審查作為場址和項目批准事項處理。
